svg.title: Burger Builder — Azure 3-tier architecture
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing traffic flowing top-down from the internet through App Gateway WAF into a private Azure VNet containing web, API, data, ops, and observability tiers.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does public traffic reach the application?')
sendPrompt('What does the App Gateway WAF v2 do and how is it configured?')
sendPrompt('What runs on vm-web and how is nginx configured?')
sendPrompt('What runs on vm-api and what port does Spring Boot use?')
sendPrompt('How is Azure SQL secured with a Private Endpoint and Private DNS?')
sendPrompt('How does Key Vault store and protect secrets?')
sendPrompt('What does vm-ops host and why is it in a separate subnet?')
sendPrompt('How does the self-hosted GitHub Actions runner work inside the private network?')
sendPrompt('How does Terraform remote state work with Azure Blob Storage?')
sendPrompt('What does Log Analytics collect and what alerts are configured?')
sendPrompt('How is Application Insights connected to the backend?')
